audio_description: The audio clip features a male voice with a clear and steady tone, speaking at a moderate pace. There are no noticeable background sounds or emotional inflections, suggesting a calm and neutral delivery.
temporal_description: The scene depicts a street with police officers and vehicles, including a police van and a red car, positioned near a building with a visible “146” sign. Several officers stand in groups, some facing each other or looking around, while others appear to be conversing or observing the area. A blue-and-white police tape cordons off part of the street, and pedestrians are visible in the background near the elevated roadway. The officers are dressed in uniforms, with some standing upright and others leaning slightly, and their gazes are directed toward various points in the scene, suggesting active monitoring or discussion.
